description_long: This handcart features a rectangular cargo bed with solid side panels and prominent vertical side rails for securing loads. The cart is supported by a single large wheel mounted centrally beneath the bed, allowing for easy maneuverability. At the front, a long, straight handle extends outward, designed for pulling or pushing the cart. The rear of the cart has a flat, extended platform, possibly for stabilizing the load or assisting with loading and unloading. The entire structure appears to be constructed from metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. The surface is uniformly dark, suggesting a painted or powder-coated finish for durability.
description: A sturdy, metal handcart with a rectangular cargo bed, side rails, a single central wheel, and a long front handle, all finished in a dark color.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular cargo bed, side rails, central wheel, and extended front handle.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat rear platform and the solid back panel of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the handle and wheel visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the long handle and the open front of the cargo bed.
